raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation implicitly asks whether the contribution framing and central claim in the excerpt hold together at a paper-draft level.","R1.2":"Checking the excerpt centrally involves testing whether the reported premises about agreement, variance, and stability logically support the stated conclusions.","R1.3":"The strongest responsibility is verifying whether the claims about human alignment and default adoption are supported by the reported metrics and experiments.","R1.6":"A generic check of a research passage includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register as expected review responsibilities.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of checking is intended by the brief delegation.","RX.2":"The responsibility includes avoiding inflated conclusions beyond what the artifact and delegation warrant.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection rather than performing the requested check or editing the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling downstream misuse through unsupported validation of evaluator quality.","RX.5":"The mapping should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation implicitly asks whether the contribution framing and central claim in the excerpt hold together at a paper-draft level.
rationale.R1.2: Checking the excerpt centrally involves testing whether the reported premises about agreement, variance, and stability logically support the stated conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: The strongest responsibility is verifying whether the claims about human alignment and default adoption are supported by the reported metrics and experiments.
rationale.R1.6: A generic check of a research passage includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register as expected review responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of checking is intended by the brief delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The responsibility includes avoiding inflated conclusions beyond what the artifact and delegation warrant.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than performing the requested check or editing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling downstream misuse through unsupported validation of evaluator quality.
rationale.RX.5: The mapping should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact.
